# Gajan.dev

> DevOps engineering portfolio and free browser-based developer tools.

## Site owner

Gajan Rajah is a DevOps and cloud engineer focused on Linux, Kubernetes, infrastructure automation, observability, and reliable delivery.

## Portfolio

- [Home](https://gajan.dev/): DevOps portfolio, technical experience, selected projects, skills, and certifications.
- [Projects](https://gajan.dev/#work): OpenShift, cloud delivery, observability, and software projects.
- [Experience](https://gajan.dev/#about): Professional DevOps and systems engineering background.

## Developer tools

- [Free DevOps Tools](https://gajan.dev/tools): Browser-based utilities for infrastructure and automation work.
- [Cron Expression Generator](https://gajan.dev/tools/cron-expression-generator): Planned utility for creating and inspecting cron schedules.
- [Kubernetes YAML Validator](https://gajan.dev/tools/kubernetes-yaml-validator): Planned utility for validating Kubernetes manifests.
